== Notes for [[Item:Q57157|Q57157]] ==

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Diego_Luis_de_San_Vitores Wikipedia]

[https://dbe.rah.es/biografias/15602/beato-diego-luis-de-san-vitores Biography]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADBCE1A61EFBBFA9822EF79916C6DDA
geni:6000000187438753823

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
